summary: Tested Varanasi Paradise Homestay full-stack app. Backend: 7/7 pytest passed (health, property, inquiries CRUD, validation, _id excluded, sort desc). Frontend: 17/18 Playwright checks passed (hero, navbar, gallery=6, bedrooms=3, amenities=12, reviews carousel, booking form submit→success toast→fields cleared, mobile menu toggle, Airbnb link). One minor UX gap: empty-form submit does NOT show toast.error because HTML5 'required' attributes trigger native validation tooltip first, short-circuiting React's onSubmit handler.

integration_issues.issue: Expected toast.error('Please share your name and email...') is NOT shown when submitting empty form. HTML5 'required' attribute on Field inputs causes the browser's native validation tooltip to fire and blocks the React onSubmit handler from executing, so the toast never appears. Either remove 'required' to let JS handle validation (and show the toast), or accept native validation as the UX.

action_items: Decide on empty-form validation UX: either drop HTML5 'required' on name/email Field inputs so the existing toast.error path is reached, or update the requirement (native validation already provides feedback, so this may be acceptable).
Optional: add noValidate to the <form> to defer entirely to the JS validation + toast path.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: model_config extra='ignore' is fine; created_at stored as ISO string but list endpoint reparses to datetime — works but adds CPU cost; consider storing native BSON datetime instead.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — switch to FastAPI lifespan handlers (Pydantic/FastAPI deprecation).
BookingForm.jsx: 'required' HTML attribute conflicts with the custom JS validation/toast. Pick one source of truth.
All UI components have data-testid attributes — good testability.
_id is correctly excluded from MongoDB queries (find projection {_id:0}) — good.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 2 inquiries during testing prefixed with TEST_ via backend pytest and 1 'TEST_Playwright' via frontend test. Persisted in MongoDB inquiries collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints. Frontend uses data-testid on all interactive elements. Calendar uses shadcn Calendar (button[name='day']) inside Popover with data-testid='booking-calendar'. Sonner toasts are queryable via 'li[data-type="success"|"error"]'. The only known gap is empty-form validation UX — HTML5 required vs JS toast — see action_items.
rca of the issue: Empty form submit not showing toast: <input required /> on Field components causes browser to call form.checkValidity() before submit event fires; when invalid it prevents submit, so React's onSubmit (which contains toast.error) never runs. Fix options: (1) add noValidate to <form>, OR (2) remove required props from Field and rely on JS validation.
